message:
feat: Implement real platform info using uname syscall

- node(): Use uname().nodename on POSIX, GetComputerNameExA on Windows
- release(): Use uname().release for kernel version (e.g., "5.15.0")
- version(): Use uname().version for build info
- Add caching for release/version to avoid repeated syscalls

Replaces placeholder "localhost" and "0.0.0" with actual system info.
